name: @clodex/clodex-cli
description: Minimal headless agent CLI for local smoke tests

scripts.build: pnpm -F @clodex/agent-core build && pnpm -F @clodex/agent-shell build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: pnpm -F @clodex/agent-core build && pnpm -F @clodex/agent-shell build && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -F @clodex/agent-core build && pnpm -F @clodex/agent-shell build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
